name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- ManageGameObject Create now applies top-level ComponentProperties after all requested components are added.
- Private [SerializeField] values are written through SerializedObject and verified by post-write readback, including bool false-to-true changes.
- Short and fully-qualified component type names are supported consistently.
- Property mutation responses include applied/skipped entries, requested and actual values, and readback status.
- Unknown components, missing fields, invalid values, and readback mismatches fail explicitly instead of returning silent success.
- MCP regression covers the workflow in both Edit Mode and Play Mode.

### Previous Changes

- Mixed ScriptApplyEdits Preview and Apply use one ordered in-memory pipeline with SHA parity.
- VersionControl supports single and multi-asset inspection, editability, and checkout workflows with per-asset diagnostics.
- ManageUI SetGraphic applies and verifies TextMeshProUGUI values in Prefab Stage while preserving Unicode.
